CustomField.description: Comma-separated tags rendered as chips on the public site — e.g. "Apex, LWC, Agentforce, Node.js". Use for project tech stacks or skill tags.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated tags rendered as chips on the site, e.g. "Apex, LWC, Agentforce, Node.js". Use for project tech stacks or skill tags.
CustomField.label: Tags / Tech Stack
